rationale: Self-preservation protocol active—SoC 11.5% with 14 min to depletion and cascading urgent requests across multiple peers indicate network-wide distress or coordinated gaming; zero outbound sharing until SoC > 50% and grid reconnected.

user:

Parser failures ongoing. Self-preservation critical; zero outbound sharing until SoC > 50% and grid reconnected. Owner and aggregator circles only for inbound requests..
